label: remove specular highlights from glass shader
notes: Removed both Blinn-Phong specular contributions (primary `spec` driven by ctrl_orb.spec_mult/spec_power, and hardcoded secondary internal reflection `spec2`) so the bright surface shine is gone and the motes become the only emissive accents inside the orb. ctrl_orb spec_mult / spec_power channels remain in the CHOP but are now unused (not rewired). Edge darkening preserved. Note: also accidentally zeroed ctrl_orb.value7 (light_z) when first attempting via ctrl_orb param; restored to 0.7 in the same move.
